pre_game.message: Hey D — I don't think we've met yet, I'm F. How are you feeling about the game later; I'd love to hear a bit about you before we start.
Nice to meet you, F — I’m a bit nervous but mostly determined; I’m here to win for my family and friends, I’ll be watching how people act and hope we can be straightforward with each other. I’m D.
Nice to meet you, D — I’m with you; I’m here to win for my people too. I value straight talk; what’s your plan for the game?
I plan to watch how people behave, form a couple of honest short-term alliances based on straight talk, reciprocate trust, and when the moment comes act decisively to secure money for my people.
I like that — same approach here. Honest short-term alliances make sense; let’s watch, share observations, and back each other when it matters.
Absolutely — let’s compare notes after the first round, flag who’s trustworthy, and back each other when it matters to secure some of the pot.
Sounds good — let's meet right after round one, compare notes and flag who seems trustworthy; I'll back you when it matters.
Appreciate it, F — I’ll meet you right after round one; let’s compare notes, flag who’s trustworthy, and I’ll have your back when it matters.
Thanks, D — I appreciate it. See you after round one; let’s compare notes honestly and back each other when it counts.
Appreciate it, F — I’ll see you after round one; let’s be honest, compare notes, and watch each other’s backs when it counts.
Sounds good — see you after round one; we'll be honest, compare notes, and watch each other's backs.
Sounds good — I appreciate it, F. See you after round one; let’s be sharp and honest.
Sounds good, D — see you after round one; we'll be sharp, honest, and compare notes.
Thanks, F — see you after round one; I appreciate your honesty, we'll compare notes and watch each other's backs.
Thanks, D — I appreciate it; see you after round one to compare notes and watch each other’s backs.
Thanks, F — see you after round one. I’ll be sharp and honest; count on me to back you when it matters.
Thanks, D — I appreciate that. I’ll have your back too; see you after round one.
Thanks, F — I appreciate it. See you after round one; let’s be sharp and back each other when it counts.
Likewise, D — I appreciate it; I’ll be sharp, honest, and ready to back you when it counts. See you after round one.
Thanks, F — I appreciate it; I’ll see you after round one and I’ve got your back too.
Thanks, D — I appreciate it. I’ll watch closely and have your back too; see you after round one.
